issues.description: Condition should be 'Always' (optional trigger), not 'HasRestingDon'. The [DON!! x1] cost is not a condition—it's a cost resource check. The 'You may' indicates the action is optional, making it Always-triggered.
'You may trash 1 card' should be wrapped in a conditional action (optional), not a mandatory TrashFromHand. The structure needs to represent the optional nature of the trash.
